message:
fix(web): specificity-aware content negotiation with exact q=0 rejection

Agent change (audited SOUND by SapphireHill):
- negotiate.rs: specificity_for() ranks exact > subtype-wildcard > full-wildcard
- exact q=0 rejections now override broader wildcard matches
- invalid q values no longer silently promote to q=1.0
- error_format_from_accept respects specific JSON rejection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
